caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 12 kt and wave heights of 3.0 ft, while St. Maarten is seeing winds of 22 kt. I expect the strong winds and high rain probability in Martinique to be the most impactful weather story in the region today, with lesser effects in St. Maarten.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing max winds of 24 kt and wave heights of 5.9 ft with less than 10% rain probability, while Istanbul has max winds of 18 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the NNE and a swell period of 7 s, impacting maritime activities in the Eastern Mediterranean.
